title: Malt Vinegar Garlic Stir-fry
description: A garlicky, juicy Venezuelan dish featuring malt vinegar and a tadka (spice blend) in one pot for a gluten-free-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 3 cloves garlic, minced
ingredients.notes: ensure they are properly minced for maximum flavor

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup olive oil
ingredients.notes: ensure it's cold-pressed for better flavor and health benefits

ingredients.name: 1 onion, sliced thinly
ingredients.notes: use a mix of sweet and spicy onions if available

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp tarka (spice blend)
ingredients.notes: ensure it includes mustard seeds, cumin, fenugreek leaves, and chili powder

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic and onions to the pan and cook until they turn golden brown.
Add bell peppers and broccoli, tossing well to coat with the garlic and onion mixture.
Sprinkle tarka evenly over the vegetables. Cook for another minute.
Pour in malt vinegar. Stir continuously to ensure it doesn't burn.
Reduce heat to low and let cook for 10-15 minutes until the vegetables are tender and slightly caramelized.
Season with turmeric powder to taste, if using.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
